verdict_reasoning: LYN is canonically an inner-leaflet-anchored Src-family kinase (myristoylated/palmitoylated cytoplasmic signaling protein with no TM domain). However, it has documented ecto-presentation in transformed hematopoietic cells (B-cell lymphomas and other cancers), where ecto-LYN localizes to the outer leaflet and exhibits kinase activity on extracellular substrates. This oncogenic-transformation-induced surface pool qualifies as cell-state-induced externalization.
